Off Calendar Dec-07-2007 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-06-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses & For Admissions Deemed Admitted; Sanctions Req.
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiffs Puget Sound Leasing Co. Inc.'s Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And To Have Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond to Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories and Request For Production Of Documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's Request For Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $404, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2007 Set For Trial On Apr-07-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-19-08 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 503
